content:
Architectural design software price comparison: 2026 software cost decision guide

Software price is an important consideration in the selection of architectural design software. From subscription fees to one-time purchases, from student discounts to enterprise plans, software prices directly affect design costs. This article will Complete comparison of mainstream architectural design software prices to help architects make cost decisions.

Core considerations of software prices

Software prices play a key role in the selection of architectural design software:

  • Subscription fees: annual subscription fees Than
  • One-time purchase: Permanent license price
  • Student discount: Student discount plan
  • Enterprise plan: Enterprise volume purchase price
  • Additional costs: training and plug-in fees
Mainstream software price comparison

AutoCAD price plan

AutoCAD provides a subscription purchase method.

Price plan:

  • Year Degree subscription: $1,690 per year
  • Monthly subscription: $220 per month
  • Student Free: Education version Free to use
  • Enterprise plan: Bulk purchase discount
  • Add-on package: AutoCAD + Revit package

AutoCAD price:

AutoCAD is an industry standard software. The subscription fee is relatively high, but it is highly recognized by the industry.

Revit price plan

Revit provides a subscription purchase method d.

Price plan:

  • Annual subscription: $2,425 per year
  • Monthly subscription: $305 per month
  • Free for students: Free for education version
  • Enterprise plan: Bulk purchase discount
    • Autodesk suite: multi-software package

Revit price:

Revit is the leader in BIM software, with higher subscription fees, but BIMfunctionComplete.

SketchUp price plan

h3>

SketchUp provides a subscription purchase method.

Price plan:

  • Pro version: $299 per year
  • Studio version: $699 per year
  • Free version: SketchUp FreeFree
  • Student Discount: Education Discount
  • Enterprise Plan: Bulk Purchase Discount

SketchUp Price:

SketchUp price is relatively low, cost-effective, and suitable for conceptual design.

Archicad Price Plan

Archicad provides a subscription purchase method.

Price Plan:

  • Annual Subscription: $1,860 per year
  • Perpetual License: One-time $4,500
  • Student Free: Education Edition Free
  • Enterprise Plan: Bulk Purchase Discount
  • Additional modules: Professional module additional cost

Archicad Price:

Arc hicad provides two options, subscription and permanent, at moderate prices.

Software price development trend forecast

Subscription system will become mainstream

Subscription system will become the mainstream method of software purchase. Annual subscriptions provide continuous updates, and one-time purchases will gradually decrease.

Cloud subscription integration

Cloud subscription will be integrated with desktop subscription. Designers can obtain dual functions of cloud and desktop.

Expanded student discounts

Student discounts will be expanded. Education The version software will be richer and support educational development.

Enterprise solution optimization

Enterprise solution will be more optimized. Bulk purchases will get more discounts and reduce enterprise costs.

Purchase suggestions

Consider price factors when choosing software:

  • Budget evaluation: evaluate annual subscription and long-term costs
  • Student status: take advantage of student discount costs reduction
  • Enterprise size: Large enterprises are suitable for enterprise solutions
  • Additional costs: consider training and plug-in costs
  • Long-term planning: evaluate the long-term cost of software use

Software price is a key factor in cost decisions. Choose reasonably priced software and optimize design cost investment.
author: Agricultural Technology Research Team
